Poe vs Alibaba Bailian

Compare Poe and Alibaba Bailian: free credits, features, and ratings. Which one is right for you?

Feature
Poe
Alibaba Bailian
Category
AI Assistant
AI Large Models
Rating
⭐ 4
⭐ 4
Free Credits
0 undefined
100 undefined
Refresh Period
daily
one-time
Resolution
Watermark
No
No
Commercial Use
No
Yes
Paid From
$20/month
Pay-per-use after free credits consumed

Poe

AI aggregation platform by Quora, one interface for all major models. Free users get daily credits to use GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet, Gemini, Llama. $20/month for more usage and premium models.

Pros

  • ✓One platform for all major AI models
  • ✓Free credits enough for daily use
  • ✓Rich custom and community Bot ecosystem
  • ✓No need for multiple accounts
  • ✓API access available

Cons

  • ✗Limited free credits for heavy use
  • ✗Paid $20/month similar to subscribing directly
  • ✗Premium models (like Opus) consume more credits
  • ✗Requires VPN in some regions

Key Features

Multi-model aggregation (GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, etc.)Custom Bot CreationBot MarketplaceFile Upload AnalysisImage Generation (DALL-E, SD, etc.)API AccessiOS/Android Apps
View Details →

Alibaba Bailian

Alibaba Cloud's LLM platform (DashScope) with 130+ models via unified API. New users get 1M free tokens per model, covering Qwen series, vision models, Tongyi Wanxiang image generation. All models share one API key, OpenAI compatible.

Pros

  • ✓130+ models, unified API and key
  • ✓~1M free tokens per model
  • ✓Qwen series, low latency in China
  • ✓OpenAI compatible, easy integration
  • ✓Full modality: text/vision/image/voice
  • ✓Alibaba Cloud stable and reliable

Cons

  • ✗Requires ID verification
  • ✗Free credits not directly visible, check per model
  • ✗API Key location is hidden deep
  • ✗One-time credits, no refresh

Key Features

130+ models unified accessQwen3.6-Flash fast modelQwen-VL-OCR vision recognitionTongyi Wanxiang image generationAll models share one API keyOpenAI SDK compatible
View Details →
